tag_line: Making The Impossible Possible. Turning Data into Solutions.
subTitle: Problem solving is what makes me unique.
favorites_quote: Courage is more exciting than fear and in the long run it is easier. We do not have to become heroes overnight. Just one step at a time, meeting each thing that comes up, seeing it is not as dreadful as it appeared, discovering we have the strength to stare it down.
intro_tagline: The Goal is to turn data into information and information into insights...
bio_desc: As a Data Science Alchemist (Action ,Learning, Confidence, Humility, Enthusiasm, Majestic Dreamer, Innovation, Strategic Thinker, Tinkering) student at the University of Management and Technology (UMT), I am committed to exploring the potential of data-driven solutions. My experience at Code Xperts, where I transitioned from a Front-End Developer to a Data Scientist, has equipped me with a solid foundation in Python, Machine Learning, and Artificial Intelligence. I thrive on solving complex problems and leveraging data analysis to create innovative solutions. In addition to my studies, I volunteer with AKF, which enhances my collaboration and leadership skills in diverse environments. I am eager to expand my knowledge in the ever-evolving fields of AI and ML, continually seeking ..
